name: Turkey Scaloppine with Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 pound skinless turkey light meat, sliced breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, smoothly puree tomatoes and their liquid.
2. Lightly sprinkle turkey breast slices with salt and pepper, then coat with flour.
3. Heat olive oil in a wide frying pan over medium-high heat.
4. Add turkey to the pan and cook 1 1/2 to 2 minutes on each side or until lightly browned. Remove turkey from the pan and keep warm.
5. Add wine to the pan and stir to scrape up any browned bits.
6. Add pureed tomatoes, chicken broth, and sage. Heat to simmering; let it simmer for 5 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
7. Stir in peas and cook for 1 minute to heat through.
8. Pour the sauce over the turkey.
Makes 4 servings.
Jan Nix of Palo Alto is author of "Food and Fitness" (HP Books).
